patterns.description: All 4 main apps (store, admin, payments, studio) correctly include the @source directive for ui package scanning: '@source ../../../../packages/ui/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'. auth and landing apps also include this directive. CSS consistency rule is met.
No hardcoded Tailwind palette colors found (text-red-*, bg-green-*, etc.) in production components. Semantic color tokens (text-destructive, bg-success, etc.) are consistently used across all apps.
No inline style objects with hardcoded color values found. The FeaturedRibbon.tsx uses Canvas API directly (not CSS) for its ribbon, which is appropriate for that use case.

CATEGORY_COLOR_MAP and TYPE_COLOR_MAP in products/domain/constants.ts use CSS custom properties (var(--pink), var(--mint), etc.) correctly. These are CSS variable strings which should remain inline - no constants extraction needed.
